title: 2020 Proxy Packets Are On The Way! Virtual Town Hall Meetings Scheduled 8/25 &9/14
summary: 2020 Shareholder Proxy packets are in the mail and on their way to Shareholder’s homes. You don’t have to wait, however. The Annual Report, Proxy Statement, Candidate Speeches, and meeting presentations are available for your review on the My Koniag Shareholder Portal… Source
